description: Materialize a custom PufferEnv environment template (single-agent grid-world + multi-agent cooperative navigation) into record_store and, when pufferlib is importable, run its built-in test_environment() self-check.
rules: read-only: writes only under record_store, never mutates a remote service
the vendored env_template.py is emitted verbatim as the scaffold artifact
the self-test (test_environment) runs only when pufferlib is importable; otherwise the scaffold is still produced
GRID_SIZE is recorded in the audit line for reproducibility
usage: Set GRID_SIZE (grid world side length, e.g. 10). Outputs: env_scaffold.py (the materialized template) and env_scaffold.log (self-test stdout/stderr or the absent-stack note).
limitation: The PufferEnv self-test only runs if pufferlib (and numpy) are installed; without them the scaffold is emitted but not exercised. No training is performed.
